body_transformation: The compact muscular body now features a sleek, wiry frame with a reduced fat layer, its dark brown stripes replaced by jagged electric-blue lightning-bolt spines along the spine. The pale cream underbelly transforms into a vibrant yellow circuit-like pattern glowing with neon green energy. The rounded head maintains its small ears but gains sharp angular contours, while the stubby legs now bear sparking fur tips at the joints. The pointed tail tip retains its dark brown stripe but is encircled by a pulsating electric-blue glow.
signature_feature: Spine spines: jagged lightning-bolt shaped electric-blue spines with neon green circuit patterns.
